examples: Turning Cuban boat people away would be an inhumane action.
To pressure zoos to spend less on their animals would lead to inhumane outcomes for the precious creatures in their care.
The arbalest is a dangerous weapon and is sometimes considered inhumane.
Do businesses today still allow these inhumane relics of the Industrial Revolution to survive?
It was a nice try by a defense attorney to decrease inhumane treatment to aggravation.
